THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COLES, CLODAGH RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JOHNSON, FELECIA $1,171.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,201.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
